description_long: This is a sleek, black police car styled as a high-performance sports coupe, featuring a low, aerodynamic profile and wide stance. The vehicle is adorned with bold red 'POLICE' lettering on the hood, rear, and both sides, accompanied by a dynamic white checkered stripe graphic along the doors. A prominent roof-mounted light bar with red and blue segments signals its emergency status, while the car's windows are tinted and the wheels are large with a five-spoke design in white. The rear of the car displays dual exhaust pipes and red taillights, and the front features a subtle emblem on the hood. The overall appearance is aggressive and modern, suitable for high-speed urban pursuits.
description: A black, high-performance police sports car with red 'POLICE' markings, checkered side graphics, and a roof-mounted red and blue light bar.
description_view_0: Rear view showing red 'POLICE' text on the trunk, dual exhausts, red taillights, and the roof light bar.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the checkered stripe, red 'POLICE' text, white wheels, and the roof light bar.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the 'POLICE' text on the hood, the car emblem, headlights, and the roof light bar.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with checkered stripe, red 'POLICE' text, white wheels, and the roof light bar.
attribute_police_markings: Red 'POLICE' text is visible on the hood, rear trunk, and both side doors. The side doors also feature a white checkered stripe graphic running diagonally behind the 'POLICE' text. The markings are bold and easily identifiable.
attribute_emergency_lights: A roof-mounted rectangular light bar is present, featuring red and blue segments arranged side by side. The light bar is centrally placed on the roof.
attribute_license_plate: A white license plate is visible at the rear, but no text or special markings are discernible.
